overview: This appears to be an albino anole lizard, a highly rare occurrence in nature. The pale, translucent coloration makes these lizards very easy targets for predators, resulting in extremely short life expectancies in the wild. While albino anoles can be hatched through scientific gene editing, wild albino sightings like this one are exceptional. This appears to be an albino anole lizard, a highly rare occurrence in nature.
The pale, translucent coloration makes these lizards very easy targets for predators, resulting in extremely short life expectancies in the wild.
While albino anoles can be hatched through scientific gene editing, wild albino sightings like this one are exceptional.
